records.description: Docker port already allocated — use ephemeral port binding or offset ports

stderr_regex: Bind for.*failed: port is already allocated|bind: address already in use|Error starting userland proxy.*bind

shortest_verification.command: bash -c 'echo "Error response from daemon: driver failed programming external connectivity on endpoint web-1 (abc123): Bind for 0.0.0.0:8080 failed: port is already allocated" >&2; exit 1'
shortest_verification.expected_stderr_match: port is already allocated|address already in use

fix_path.description: Docker port already allocated — use ephemeral port binding or offset ports

legacy_v3.stderr_pattern: Bind for.*failed: port is already allocated|bind: address already in use|Error starting userland proxy.*bind
legacy_v3.description: Docker port already allocated — use ephemeral port binding or offset ports

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "Error response from daemon: driver failed programming external connectivity on endpoint web-1 (abc123): Bind for 0.0.0.0:8080 failed: port is already allocated" >&2; exit 1'
reproduction.expected_stderr_match: port is already allocated|address already in use
